_comment: Calibrated for THIS RadioMaster Pocket (EdgeTX USB-joystick mode) + Betaflight default AETR rcmap. Channel order MUST be AETR to match Betaflight: [roll, pitch, THROTTLE, yaw, aux1=ARM, aux2..]. Gimbals: axis0=roll, axis1=pitch, axis2=throttle (rests at bottom), axis3=yaw. Switches are AXES: axis7=2-pos (ARM), axes5/6=3-pos (modes), axis4=spare. Verify with `rc_bridge.py --dry-run`; confirmed against FC MSP_RC read-back.
